items.preparationNotes: Prawns cooked and tossed in BBQ sauce. Inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
items.customerGuidance: Succulent BBQ prawns with a smoky, sweet, or tangy glaze.

items.name: Salmon steak
items.description: A thick cut of salmon, typically grilled, pan-seared, or baked, often seasoned simply to highlight its natural flavor.
items.preparationNotes: Salmon steak cooked to order. Typically seasoned lightly. Check for any accompanying sauces.
items.customerGuidance: Flavorful and flaky salmon steak, rich in Omega-3s. (Values per approx. 6oz/170g serving).

items.name: Vegetable kebabs
items.description: Skewers of assorted fresh vegetables, such as bell peppers, onions, zucchini, cherry tomatoes, and mushrooms, often marinated and grilled or roasted.
items.preparationNotes: Assorted vegetables grilled on skewers. Marinade is typically oil, vinegar and herb based; confirm if specific concerns.
items.customerGuidance: Colorful and healthy grilled vegetable skewers. (Values per 1-2 skewers).

items.name: Grilled Cauliflower Steaks
items.description: Thick-cut slices of cauliflower, seasoned and grilled or roasted until tender-crisp, often served as a vegetarian main course alternative.
items.preparationNotes: Thick slices of cauliflower, seasoned and grilled. Check for any specific sauces served alongside.
items.customerGuidance: A hearty and flavorful plant-based 'steak'. (Values per large steak, approx 150-200g).

items.name: Caesar
items.description: A classic salad of romaine lettuce and croutons dressed with lemon juice (or lime), olive oil, egg, Worcestershire sauce, anchovies, garlic, Dijon mustard, Parmesan cheese, and black pepper.
items.preparationNotes: Traditionally made with romaine lettuce and a creamy dressing containing anchovies and Parmesan cheese. Croutons add a crunchy texture.
items.customerGuidance: A rich and savory classic salad. Not vegetarian due to anchovies in dressing.

items.name: Wedge Salad
items.description: A classic American salad made from a wedge of iceberg lettuce topped with blue cheese dressing, bacon crumbles, tomatoes, and sometimes red onions.
items.preparationNotes: A crisp wedge of iceberg lettuce generously topped with creamy blue cheese dressing and savory bacon.
items.customerGuidance: Crisp and refreshing with a rich, tangy blue cheese dressing and bacon.

items.name: German cucumber salad
items.description: A refreshing salad made with thinly sliced cucumbers, often with dill, and a dressing that can be creamy (with sour cream or yogurt) or vinaigrette-based.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_DAIRY (if made with sour cream/yogurt)
items.preparationNotes: Thinly sliced cucumbers in a tangy dressing. Can be creamy or clear. Check daily preparation for dairy.
items.customerGuidance: Refreshing cucumber salad with dill. Ask if you prefer a non-creamy version (if available).

items.name: Tossed Cobb Salad
items.description: A substantial American garden salad typically made with chopped salad greens, tomato, crisp bacon, grilled or roasted chicken breast, hard-boiled eggs, avocado, chives, Roquefort cheese, and red-wine vinaigrette.
items.preparationNotes: A hearty and flavorful salad with a variety of textures and ingredients, often served as a main course.
items.customerGuidance: A satisfying main-course salad packed with chicken, bacon, egg, avocado, and blue cheese.

items.name: Kansas City BBQ Sauce
items.description: A thick, sweet, and tangy tomato-based barbecue sauce, often with molasses. It's known for its rich flavor and reddish-brown color.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_SOY (in Worcestershire or other flavorings)
May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if certain thickeners or Worcestershire sauce used)
items.preparationNotes: Classic sweet, tangy, and smoky BBQ sauce. Check for anchovies in Worcestershire for vegan suitability.
items.customerGuidance: Rich, sweet, and tangy Kansas City style BBQ sauce.

allItems.name: Stuffed Poblano Peppers with savory rice and beans
allItems.description: Mild poblano peppers roasted and stuffed with a savory mixture of rice, black beans, corn, tomatoes, onions, and spices, often topped with cheese or a vegan alternative.
allItems.preparationNotes: Roasted poblano peppers filled with a flavorful rice, bean, and corn mixture.
allItems.customerGuidance: Flavorful and satisfying stuffed poblano peppers with a savory rice and bean filling.

allItems.name: Cilantro-Lime Rice, fresh and zesty
allItems.description: Fluffy rice (typically long-grain white rice) seasoned with fresh cilantro, lime juice, and often a touch of lime zest and salt. A popular side for Mexican and Southwestern dishes.
allItems.preparationNotes: Rice flavored with fresh cilantro and lime juice.
allItems.customerGuidance: Bright, zesty, and refreshing cilantro-lime rice.

allItems.name: Mexican Rice
allItems.description: Also known as Spanish rice, this is a popular side dish made from white rice cooked in a tomato-based broth with onions, garlic, and various seasonings like cumin and chili powder.
dietaryFlags: VEGAN_OPTION (if vegetable broth and no lard)
allItems.preparationNotes: Rice cooked in a savory tomato broth with onions, garlic, and spices.
allItems.customerGuidance: Flavorful and savory Mexican-style rice. (Nutritional values per serving)

allItems.name: Grilled Vegetables
allItems.description: A medley of seasonal vegetables, such as bell peppers, zucchini, yellow squash, asparagus, and onions, lightly seasoned and grilled to bring out their natural sweetness and smoky flavor.
allItems.preparationNotes: A mix of seasonal vegetables, grilled with simple seasonings. Check for any specific glazes or marinades used.
allItems.customerGuidance: A healthy and flavorful assortment of grilled seasonal vegetables. (Values per 1 cup serving).

allItems.name: Barbacoa
allItems.description: Traditionally, barbacoa refers to meat (often beef, lamb, or goat) slow-cooked until tender, typically seasoned with chilies and spices. In modern Mexican-American cuisine, beef barbacoa often involves beef cheeks or chuck roast slow-cooked with chipotle peppers, cumin, cloves, and other seasonings.
allItems.preparationNotes: Slow-cooked, tender, and flavorful shredded beef seasoned with chilies and spices.
allItems.customerGuidance: Rich, savory, and tender slow-cooked barbacoa beef. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

allItems.name: Pork Carnitas
allItems.description: A Mexican dish of pork (often shoulder or butt) slow-cooked until very tender, then typically shredded and crisped up. Seasoned with ingredients like oranges, lime, onion, garlic, and spices.
allItems.preparationNotes: Slow-cooked, tender, and crispy shredded pork with citrus and spice notes.
allItems.customerGuidance: Juicy and flavorful slow-cooked pork carnitas. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

allItems.name: Pork Belly
allItems.description: A boneless cut of fatty meat from the belly of a pig. When cooked (e.g., roasted, braised, seared), it's known for its rich flavor, tender meat, and often crispy skin.
allItems.preparationNotes: Rich and succulent pork belly, preparation style varies.
allItems.customerGuidance: Indulgent and flavorful pork belly. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz, can vary significantly)

allItems.name: Flank steak Fajitas
allItems.description: A popular Tex-Mex dish consisting of grilled strips of marinated flank steak, typically served sizzling with sautéed bell peppers and onions. Often accompanied by tortillas, salsa, guacamole, and sour cream.
dietaryFlags: GLUTEN_FREE_OPTION (if served without flour tortillas or with corn tortillas)
allItems.preparationNotes: Grilled marinated flank steak strips with sautéed peppers and onions.
allItems.customerGuidance: Sizzling flank steak fajitas with colorful peppers and onions. (Nutritional values for steak & vegetables, excludes tortillas/sides)

allItems.name: Ground Beef
allItems.description: Seasoned cooked ground beef, often served as a protein option for tacos, bowls, or salads. Seasonings typically include chili powder, cumin, garlic, and onion powder.
allItems.preparationNotes: Seasoned and cooked ground beef.
allItems.customerGuidance: Savory seasoned ground beef. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

allItems.name: Chorizo
allItems.description: A type of pork sausage, typically seasoned with paprika, garlic, and other spices. Can be fresh (requiring cooking) or cured (ready to eat). Mexican chorizo is usually fresh and spicy; Spanish chorizo is often smoked and cured.
allItems.preparationNotes: Spicy and savory pork sausage.
allItems.customerGuidance: Flavorful and often spicy chorizo sausage. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 3-4oz)

allItems.name: Mexican Chicken
allItems.description: Cooked chicken seasoned with Mexican-inspired spices like cumin, chili powder, paprika, oregano, garlic, and onion. Often shredded or diced for use in tacos, burritos, salads, or bowls.
allItems.preparationNotes: Flavorfully seasoned cooked chicken with Mexican spices.
allItems.customerGuidance: Tender and savory Mexican-spiced chicken. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

allItems.name: Chorizo Queso Dip
allItems.description: A rich and savory melted cheese dip (queso) with spicy chorizo sausage mixed in. Served warm, typically with tortilla chips.
allItems.preparationNotes: Warm, creamy queso dip blended with spicy chorizo sausage.
allItems.customerGuidance: Indulgent and savory queso dip with a kick of chorizo. (Nutritional values per serving of dip, excludes chips)

allItems.name: Queso Dip
allItems.description: A warm, creamy, melted cheese dip, popular in Tex-Mex cuisine. Often made with processed cheese (like Velveeta) or a blend of cheeses (like cheddar, Monterey Jack) mixed with milk or cream, and typically includes chili peppers (e.g., jalapeños, green chilies) and sometimes tomatoes, onions, or spices. Served with tortilla chips.
allItems.preparationNotes: Warm, creamy melted cheese dip, often with chilies.
allItems.customerGuidance: Rich and creamy queso dip, perfect for sharing. (Nutritional values per serving of dip, excludes chips)

allItems.name: Beef Birria
allItems.description: A traditional Mexican stew, typically made with goat meat, but beef birria is also very popular. The meat is slow-cooked in a rich, savory broth flavored with various chilies (e.g., guajillo, ancho), garlic, cumin, bay leaves, and other spices. Often served as a stew or as taco filling, with consommé on the side.
allItems.preparationNotes: Tender, slow-cooked beef in a rich and aromatic chili-spiced broth.
allItems.customerGuidance: Deeply savory and tender beef birria, perfect in tacos or as a stew. (Nutritional values per serving of meat)

allItems.name: Cod
allItems.description: A mild, white fish. As a menu item, it's typically cooked by methods like baking, grilling, pan-searing, or frying, and can be seasoned simply or served with various sauces.
allItems.preparationNotes: Cooked cod fillet; preparation method (e.g., baked, grilled) determines final characteristics.
allItems.customerGuidance: Mild and flaky cod, cooked to order. (Nutritional values for plain cooked cod, e.g., 4oz)

allItems.name: Shrimp
allItems.description: Cooked shrimp, often served as a protein add-on or main component. Preparation can vary (e.g., grilled, sautéed, boiled) and may include various seasonings.
allItems.preparationNotes: Cooked shrimp; preparation method determines final characteristics.
allItems.customerGuidance: Succulent cooked shrimp. (Nutritional values for plain cooked shrimp, e.g., 4oz)

allItems.name: Tofu
allItems.description: Soybean curd, a versatile plant-based protein. As a menu item, it's typically prepared in various ways (e.g., grilled, baked, pan-fried, scrambled) and can be seasoned or marinated.
allergenAlerts: POTENTIAL_WHEAT (in some marinades/soy sauces - verify if GF needed)
allItems.preparationNotes: Prepared tofu; specific flavor profile depends on seasoning and cooking method.
allItems.customerGuidance: Versatile plant-based tofu, prepared to order. (Nutritional values for plain cooked tofu, e.g., 4oz, before heavy sauces/marinades)

allItems.name: Roasted Vegetables
allItems.description: A medley of seasonal vegetables roasted with olive oil, salt, pepper, and often herbs, until tender and slightly caramelized.
allItems.preparationNotes: A mix of seasonal vegetables, roasted until tender and flavorful.
allItems.customerGuidance: A delicious and healthy medley of roasted seasonal vegetables.

allItems.name: Escabeche - House-made picked vegetable medley
allItems.description: A Latin American and Mediterranean condiment or side dish of pickled vegetables. This house-made version is a medley, likely featuring carrots, onions, jalapeños, cauliflower, and herbs in a vinegar-based brine.
allItems.preparationNotes: A house-made medley of pickled vegetables in a tangy brine.
allItems.customerGuidance: Our signature house-made pickled vegetable medley, Escabeche. (Nutritional values per small serving)

allItems.name: Refried Beans
allItems.description: A traditional Mexican and Tex-Mex dish of cooked and mashed beans (typically pinto or black beans), fried or baked with ingredients like lard or oil, onions, garlic, and spices.
allItems.preparationNotes: Mashed and cooked beans, seasoned and fried or baked. Specify if vegetarian preparation is needed.
allItems.customerGuidance: Creamy and savory refried beans. (Specify vegetarian if required)

allItems.name: Jalapeno cornbread
allItems.description: Cornbread with the added kick of diced jalapeño peppers, offering a balance of sweet, savory, and spicy flavors. Often includes cheese as well.
allItems.preparationNotes: Cornbread with jalapeños for a spicy kick. Contains wheat, egg, and dairy.
allItems.customerGuidance: Moist cornbread with a pleasant jalapeño spice. (Values per average slice/muffin).

allItems.name: Mexican Street corn (Elotes)
allItems.description: A popular Mexican street food where grilled or boiled corn on the cob is typically slathered with mayonnaise, cotija cheese, chili powder, lime juice, and sometimes cilantro.
allItems.preparationNotes: Grilled or boiled corn on the cob with a creamy, cheesy, and spicy topping.
allItems.customerGuidance: Authentic Mexican street corn: sweet, savory, spicy, and tangy all in one.

allItems.name: Rice and Beans
allItems.description: A staple dish in many cultures, typically consisting of cooked rice served with cooked beans (e.g., black beans, pinto beans, kidney beans). Seasonings and preparation methods vary widely by region.
allItems.preparationNotes: A combination of cooked rice and beans; preparation style varies.
allItems.customerGuidance: A hearty and nutritious serving of rice and beans. (Nutritional values per serving)

allItems.name: Mexican Slaw with Mango
allItems.description: A refreshing and crunchy slaw with a Mexican twist, typically featuring shredded cabbage, carrots, red onion, fresh cilantro, sweet mango, and a zesty lime-based dressing, often with a hint of spice.
allItems.preparationNotes: Crunchy cabbage slaw with sweet mango, cilantro, and a tangy lime dressing.
allItems.customerGuidance: A vibrant Mexican-style slaw with the sweetness of mango and a zesty lime kick.

allItems.name: Vegetarian Empanadas
allItems.description: Savory turnovers made with pastry dough and filled with a vegetarian mixture, which can include ingredients like spiced potatoes, peas, corn, cheese, spinach, mushrooms, or lentils. Baked or fried.

allItems.preparationNotes: Pastry turnovers with a savory vegetarian filling; filling specifics vary.
allItems.customerGuidance: Delicious vegetarian empanadas with a savory filling. Inquire for today's filling. (Nutritional values per empanada)

allItems.name: Classic Pico de Gallo
allItems.description: A fresh, uncooked salsa made from chopped tomatoes, onions, serrano or jalapeño peppers, cilantro, salt, and lime juice. Also known as salsa fresca or salsa cruda.
allItems.preparationNotes: A simple, fresh salsa of chopped tomatoes, onions, peppers, cilantro, and lime.
allItems.customerGuidance: Freshly made classic pico de gallo. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

allItems.name: Fresh Mango Salsa
allItems.description: A sweet and savory salsa made with diced fresh mango, red onion, jalapeño or bell pepper, cilantro, and lime juice. Great with grilled fish, chicken, or chips.
allItems.preparationNotes: A vibrant salsa combining sweet mango with onion, pepper, cilantro, and lime.
allItems.customerGuidance: Sweet, tangy, and refreshing fresh mango salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

allItems.name: Pineapple Habanero Salsa
allItems.description: A fiery and fruity salsa that balances the sweetness of pineapple with the intense heat of habanero peppers, often with red onion, cilantro, and lime juice.
allItems.preparationNotes: A very spicy and fruity salsa with pineapple and habanero peppers.
allItems.customerGuidance: Intensely spicy and sweet pineapple habanero salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

allItems.name: Cucumber & Apple Salsa
allItems.description: A crisp and refreshing salsa made with diced cucumber and apple, often with red onion, cilantro or mint, lime or lemon juice, and a touch of jalapeño for mild heat.
allItems.preparationNotes: A cool and crisp salsa with cucumber, apple, and fresh herbs.
allItems.customerGuidance: A uniquely refreshing cucumber and apple salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

allItems.name: Salsa Roja (red sauce)
allItems.description: A general term for a red salsa typically made from cooked or roasted tomatoes, chili peppers (e.g., jalapeños, serranos, or dried chilies like guajillo), onion, garlic, cilantro, and lime juice. Texture can range from chunky to smooth.
allItems.preparationNotes: A classic red salsa made with tomatoes, chili peppers, onion, garlic, and cilantro.
allItems.customerGuidance: Our house salsa roja, a flavorful red salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

allItems.name: Salsa Verde (green sauce)
allItems.description: A tangy green salsa typically made from tomatillos, green chili peppers (e.g., jalapeños, serranos), onion, garlic, cilantro, and lime juice. Can be cooked or raw.
allItems.preparationNotes: A classic green salsa made with tomatillos, green chilies, onion, garlic, and cilantro.

items.description: A mild, white fish. As a menu item, it's typically cooked by methods like baking, grilling, pan-searing, or frying, and can be seasoned simply or served with various sauces.
items.preparationNotes: Cooked cod fillet; preparation method (e.g., baked, grilled) determines final characteristics.
items.customerGuidance: Mild and flaky cod, cooked to order. (Nutritional values for plain cooked cod, e.g., 4oz)

items.name: Shrimp
items.description: Cooked shrimp, often served as a protein add-on or main component. Preparation can vary (e.g., grilled, sautéed, boiled) and may include various seasonings.
items.preparationNotes: Cooked shrimp; preparation method determines final characteristics.
items.customerGuidance: Succulent cooked shrimp. (Nutritional values for plain cooked shrimp, e.g., 4oz)

items.name: Tofu
items.description: Soybean curd, a versatile plant-based protein. As a menu item, it's typically prepared in various ways (e.g., grilled, baked, pan-fried, scrambled) and can be seasoned or marinated.

items.preparationNotes: Prepared tofu; specific flavor profile depends on seasoning and cooking method.
items.customerGuidance: Versatile plant-based tofu, prepared to order. (Nutritional values for plain cooked tofu, e.g., 4oz, before heavy sauces/marinades)

items.name: Roasted Vegetables
items.description: A medley of seasonal vegetables roasted with olive oil, salt, pepper, and often herbs, until tender and slightly caramelized.
items.preparationNotes: A mix of seasonal vegetables, roasted until tender and flavorful.
items.customerGuidance: A delicious and healthy medley of roasted seasonal vegetables.

items.name: Escabeche - House-made picked vegetable medley
items.description: A Latin American and Mediterranean condiment or side dish of pickled vegetables. This house-made version is a medley, likely featuring carrots, onions, jalapeños, cauliflower, and herbs in a vinegar-based brine.
items.preparationNotes: A house-made medley of pickled vegetables in a tangy brine.
items.customerGuidance: Our signature house-made pickled vegetable medley, Escabeche. (Nutritional values per small serving)

items.name: Refried Beans
items.description: A traditional Mexican and Tex-Mex dish of cooked and mashed beans (typically pinto or black beans), fried or baked with ingredients like lard or oil, onions, garlic, and spices.
items.preparationNotes: Mashed and cooked beans, seasoned and fried or baked. Specify if vegetarian preparation is needed.
items.customerGuidance: Creamy and savory refried beans. (Specify vegetarian if required)

items.name: Jalapeno cornbread
items.description: Cornbread with the added kick of diced jalapeño peppers, offering a balance of sweet, savory, and spicy flavors. Often includes cheese as well.
items.preparationNotes: Cornbread with jalapeños for a spicy kick. Contains wheat, egg, and dairy.
items.customerGuidance: Moist cornbread with a pleasant jalapeño spice. (Values per average slice/muffin).

items.name: Mexican Street corn (Elotes)
items.description: A popular Mexican street food where grilled or boiled corn on the cob is typically slathered with mayonnaise, cotija cheese, chili powder, lime juice, and sometimes cilantro.

items.customerGuidance: Authentic Mexican street corn: sweet, savory, spicy, and tangy all in one.

items.name: Rice and Beans
items.description: A staple dish in many cultures, typically consisting of cooked rice served with cooked beans (e.g., black beans, pinto beans, kidney beans). Seasonings and preparation methods vary widely by region.
items.preparationNotes: A combination of cooked rice and beans; preparation style varies.
items.customerGuidance: A hearty and nutritious serving of rice and beans. (Nutritional values per serving)

items.name: Mexican Slaw with Mango
items.description: A refreshing and crunchy slaw with a Mexican twist, typically featuring shredded cabbage, carrots, red onion, fresh cilantro, sweet mango, and a zesty lime-based dressing, often with a hint of spice.

items.customerGuidance: A vibrant Mexican-style slaw with the sweetness of mango and a zesty lime kick.

items.name: Vegetarian Empanadas
items.description: Savory turnovers made with pastry dough and filled with a vegetarian mixture, which can include ingredients like spiced potatoes, peas, corn, cheese, spinach, mushrooms, or lentils. Baked or fried.

items.customerGuidance: Delicious vegetarian empanadas with a savory filling. Inquire for today's filling. (Nutritional values per empanada)

items.name: Classic Pico de Gallo
items.description: A fresh, uncooked salsa made from chopped tomatoes, onions, serrano or jalapeño peppers, cilantro, salt, and lime juice. Also known as salsa fresca or salsa cruda.

items.name: Fresh Mango Salsa
items.description: A sweet and savory salsa made with diced fresh mango, red onion, jalapeño or bell pepper, cilantro, and lime juice. Great with grilled fish, chicken, or chips.
items.preparationNotes: A vibrant salsa combining sweet mango with onion, pepper, cilantro, and lime.
items.customerGuidance: Sweet, tangy, and refreshing fresh mango salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Pineapple Habanero Salsa
items.description: A fiery and fruity salsa that balances the sweetness of pineapple with the intense heat of habanero peppers, often with red onion, cilantro, and lime juice.
items.preparationNotes: A very spicy and fruity salsa with pineapple and habanero peppers.
items.customerGuidance: Intensely spicy and sweet pineapple habanero salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Cucumber & Apple Salsa
items.description: A crisp and refreshing salsa made with diced cucumber and apple, often with red onion, cilantro or mint, lime or lemon juice, and a touch of jalapeño for mild heat.
items.preparationNotes: A cool and crisp salsa with cucumber, apple, and fresh herbs.
items.customerGuidance: A uniquely refreshing cucumber and apple salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Salsa Roja (red sauce)
items.description: A general term for a red salsa typically made from cooked or roasted tomatoes, chili peppers (e.g., jalapeños, serranos, or dried chilies like guajillo), onion, garlic, cilantro, and lime juice. Texture can range from chunky to smooth.
items.preparationNotes: A classic red salsa made with tomatoes, chili peppers, onion, garlic, and cilantro.
items.customerGuidance: Our house salsa roja, a flavorful red salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Salsa Verde (green sauce)
items.description: A tangy green salsa typically made from tomatillos, green chili peppers (e.g., jalapeños, serranos), onion, garlic, cilantro, and lime juice. Can be cooked or raw.
items.preparationNotes: A classic green salsa made with tomatillos, green chilies, onion, garlic, and cilantro.
items.customerGuidance: Our house salsa verde, a tangy and flavorful green salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Creamy Salsa Verde (green sauce)
items.description: A variation of salsa verde that has a creamy texture, often achieved by adding avocado, sour cream, Mexican crema, or by emulsifying oil into the traditional salsa verde ingredients.

items.name: Shredded cheese
items.description: Shredded cheese, typically a blend like Monterey Jack and Cheddar, or a specific type like Cotija, offered as a topping or accompaniment.

items.name: Diced Onions

items.name: Jalapeños

items.description: Cultured cream with a characteristically sour taste, used as a condiment or topping, especially in Mexican, Eastern European, and American cuisines.

items.name: Pickled cabbage
items.description: Cabbage (often red or green) that has been pickled in a brine of vinegar, water, salt, and sometimes sugar and spices. Offers a tangy and crunchy element.

items.description: Shredded plant-based cheese alternative, typically made from ingredients like soy, nuts (cashews, almonds), coconut oil, or starches. Offered as a dairy-free topping.

items.name: Lime wedges
items.description: Fresh lime wedges offered as a garnish or for squeezing over dishes to add acidity and brightness.

items.name: Sliced radish
